en_title: New Look at Kingdom Hearts 4 May Be Coming Next Month
cn_title: 《王国之心4》下月或迎新实机展示
subtitle: 光明与黑暗之旅
opus_summary: 迪士尼D23将举办《王国之心》25周年一小时座谈会，或展示《王国之心4》新内容并公布2027年发售窗口，玩家期待新预告。

paragraphs.en: A new look at Kingdom Hearts 4 may be imminent.
paragraphs.cn: 《王国之心4》或将很快公布新消息。

paragraphs.en: Disney has confirmed its plans for D23, a Disney-specific convention that covers movies, TV shows, and anything Disney related. While you can expect updates on a bunch of major projects, there is one project that gamers are particularly interested in: Kingdom Hearts 4. While Disney hasn't explicitly confirmed a new look at the game at D23, it did confirm that there will be an hour-long panel celebrating 25 years of Kingdom Hearts.
paragraphs.cn: 迪士尼已确认D23计划。D23是专门围绕电影、电视节目及一切迪士尼相关内容的展会。届时预计会公布许多重点项目的更新，但玩家尤其关注《王国之心4》。迪士尼虽未明确确认D23会展示游戏新内容，却确认将举办一场庆祝《王国之心》25周年、时长一小时的座谈会。

paragraphs.en: "Join us for a journey through light and darkness as we commemorate 25 years of Kingdom Hearts," reads the description for the panel. "Discover how this saga united Disney, Pixar, and Square Enix, with insights from the creative minds, character voices, and more behind the magic."
paragraphs.cn: 座谈会介绍写道：「与我们一同踏上光明与黑暗之旅，纪念《王国之心》25周年。了解这一传奇如何将迪士尼、皮克斯和史克威尔艾尼克斯汇聚在一起，并聆听创意团队、角色配音演员及更多幕后人员分享魔法背后的故事。」

paragraphs.en: It would be pretty surprising if they let a celebratory 25th anniversary panel come and go without some news on Kingdom Hearts 4... but this is Square Enix we're talking about. It's not unheard of for this company or franchise to have a missed opportunity to promote a new game. However, it does seem like we're getting fairly close to its release.
paragraphs.cn: 如果这场庆祝25周年的座谈会结束时完全没有《王国之心4》的消息，确实会令人惊讶……但这可是史克威尔艾尼克斯。该公司或该系列错过宣传新作的机会并不罕见。不过，我们似乎确实离它发售不远了。

paragraphs.en: Last month, Kingdom Hearts 4 got its first trailer in four years at a Nintendo Direct. While it didn't exactly set the world on fire with any mind blowing new reveals or release date news, it did show that Square Enix is revving up the marketing machine for the game. Perhaps this D23 panel will feature a glimpse at new content in the game or give us a 2027 release window. Either way, we will just have to cross our fingers and hope Square Enix doesn't let us down.
paragraphs.cn: 上个月，《王国之心4》在任天堂直面会上公布了四年来首支预告。虽然预告没有带来惊天动地的新内容或发售日期消息，却显示史克威尔艾尼克斯正在为游戏加大宣传。也许D23座谈会会展示游戏新内容的一瞥，或给出2027年发售窗口。无论如何，我们只能祈祷并希望史克威尔艾尼克斯不要让我们失望。
